title: Fluffy Brazilian Pear Toast
description: A refreshing, bitter, and fluffy breakfast dish featuring poached pears, crispy toast, and a hint of Brazilian spices. This dish is perfect for a hangover cure or as a light breakfast option.

ingredients.name: pear
ingredients.notes: any variety, such as Bartlett or Anjou

instructions: Poach the pears in a mixture of water and vinegar until they are tender.
Remove the pears from the water and let them cool.
Toast the bread until it is crispy and golden brown.
Mix together the cashew cream, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl.
Spread the cashew cream mixture onto the toasted bread.
Place the poached pear on top of the cashew cream mixture.
Sprinkle a pinch of cinnamon on top of the pear.
